data.current_summary: Add topics to a survey response
data.description_suggestion: Adds one or more topics to an existing survey response for categorization and analysis purposes. Requires a write-permission API key for authentication. Accepts a TopicsRequest object containing the response ID and topic identifiers to associate. Returns a success response confirming the topics have been added to the response. This operation modifies the response's topic associations and enables better feedback organization and filtering.
data.reasoning: The current description is severely incomplete - it only mentions authentication requirements without explaining what the operation actually does. data.summary_suggestion: Retrieve all customers with optional filtering
data.description_suggestion: Retrieve a list of all customers in your account with optional filtering and pagination. Supports filtering by customer attributes and sorting. Returns a paginated list of customer objects containing customer details such as ID, email, name, and metadata.

data.current_description: Create a new customer. Requires write permission API key.
data.description_suggestion: Create a new customer record in your account. Accepts customer details such as email, name, and custom attributes via the CustomerCreateRequest schema. Requires write permission API key. Returns the newly created customer object with assigned ID and metadata. The customer becomes available for survey targeting immediately after creation.

data.current_description: Delete one or more customers. Requires write permission API key.
data.description_suggestion: Delete one or more customers from your account. Accepts a list of customer IDs via the DeleteCustomersRequest schema. Requires write permission API key. Returns a success response confirming deletion. Deleted customers and their associated survey responses are permanently removed and cannot be recovered.
data.reasoning: Summary is adequate but description is incomplete.
